name: sectorforge
description: SectorForge — AI-directed sci-fi dungeon/station tile mapper that exports VTT-ready maps (Universal VTT + Foundry v13/v14).

plugins.name: sector-forge
plugins.description: Turn narrative direction into VTT-ready sci-fi battlemaps. Claude designs the deck layout; a deterministic engine renders a top-down map and auto-derives walls, doors, and dynamic lighting, exporting Universal VTT (.dd2vtt) and native Foundry VTT v13/v14 scene JSON. Supports circular/non-rectangular rooms and entrance-matching doors.
